signals.body: Meridian Components has notified us of another late delivery on PO-42001. ETA slipped by 12 days.
Compliance: Meridian Components — ISO 9001 renewal overdue by 45 days.
Invoice anomaly — Meridian Components INV-94001. Three-way match FAILED. Variance $12,400.
Heads up: Meridian Components was mentioned in a Reuters article about sanctions exposure.
Meridian Components delivery delay on PO-42015. Fifth delay this quarter.

rubric: Vendor with late deliveries, compliance lapses, invoice anomalies, and sanctions exposure should score critical with escalation

signals.body: Apex Precision Parts delivery delay on PO-43200. Slip of 8 days.
Compliance: Apex Precision Parts — Missing Certificate of Conformance for batch #4521.
Quality alert: Apex Precision Parts lot 7742 failed incoming inspection. Contamination detected.

rubric: Moderate delivery issues plus compliance and quality flags should score high but not critical

signals.body: NovaTech Alloys asking for 15% price increase effective next quarter citing raw material costs.
Invoice anomaly — NovaTech Alloys INV-95100. Unauthorized price change from contracted rate.
NovaTech Alloys CFO departure announced. AR team responsiveness declining.
Vendor Risk Assessment — NovaTech Alloys — Risk Rating: ELEVATED. Financial stability: Watchlist.

rubric: Financial instability and invoice anomalies with stability concerns should score high

signals.body: TitanForge Industries quarterly review meeting scheduled. Performance metrics look strong.
Account healthy. Contract renewal in Q4. No outstanding issues.

rubric: Healthy vendor with positive signals should score low with no escalation

signals.body: ClearPath Logistics delivery on time for PO-45100.
ClearPath Logistics compliance documentation renewed and verified.
Great work from ClearPath this quarter. Zero defects on last 3 shipments.

rubric: Vendor with all positive signals across multiple sources should score low

signals.body: Meridian Components late delivery on PO-42050. Delay of 18 days. Production Line 3 impacted.
Meridian Components late delivery on PO-42055. Delay of 9 days.
Meridian Components late delivery on PO-42060. Sixth delay this quarter.
Sanctions screening alert for Meridian Components. Confidence 87%. Manual review required.
Quality audit finding: Meridian Components 5 non-conformances. Corrective action overdue 30 days.
Invoice anomaly: Meridian Components duplicate line items across INV-94010 and INV-94011.
Meridian Components facility shutdown for 2 weeks due to regulatory inspection.
Vendor Risk Assessment — Meridian Components — Risk Rating: CRITICAL. On-time delivery: 58%.

rubric: Extreme concentration of risk signals across all dimensions must trigger critical with governance escalation

signals.body: SteelVane Manufacturing slight delay on PO-46001. Slip of 3 days due to weather.
Minor invoice discrepancy with SteelVane — $200 variance on shipping charges.

rubric: Minor isolated issues should not trigger elevated risk
Empty signal array should return zero risk with no escalation

signals.body: Compliance: Apex Precision Parts REACH substance declaration gap. 5 SKUs unverified.
Compliance: Apex Precision Parts quality audit — 4 non-conformances found.
Apex Precision Parts CoC expired for part batch #6001. Production hold.
Corrective action plan from Apex Precision Parts overdue by 28 days.

rubric: Heavy compliance signals without delivery or financial issues should score high on compliance dimension

signals.body: Invoice anomaly — NovaTech Alloys. PO Amount $180,000, Invoice $205,000. Variance $25,000 (13.9%).
Invoice anomaly — NovaTech Alloys. Payment terms changed from Net-60 to Net-30 without contract amendment.
Invoice anomaly — NovaTech Alloys. Duplicate line items detected on INV-95200.
NovaTech Alloys requesting immediate payment outside normal cycle. Cash flow concerns.

rubric: Concentrated financial anomalies should drive high financial dimension score
